item.title: Salesforce计划筹集高达250亿美元资金用于回购
item.description: 知情人士透露，Salesforce公司计划发行高达250亿美元的债券用于股票回购，这将是该软件公司有史以来规模最大的债券发行。【原文：Salesforce Inc. is planning to sell as much as $25 billion of debt to fund a share buyback, according to people with knowledge of the matter, in what would be the software firm’s biggest-ever note sale.】

item.title: 油轮船队驶向红海，沙特绕开霍尔木兹海峡
item.description: 至少25艘超级油轮组成的船队正驶向沙特阿拉伯红海港口延布。由于伊朗战争导致霍尔木兹海峡航运中断，该王国正争分夺秒地将石油运往市场。【原文：A flotilla of at least 25 supertankers is heading to Saudi Arabia’s Red Sea port of Yanbu as the kingdom races to get its oil to market after the Iran war halted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 比特币反弹至71,000美元，华尔街加大力度推动加密货币发展
item.description: 比特币周二回升至71,000美元上方，此前经历了震荡的一周——价格先是飙升，随后回落，又再度攀升。但混乱的价格走势掩盖了一个更平静的事实：华尔街仍在持续布局加密货币领域。【原文：Bitcoin climbed back above $71,000 on Tuesday after a choppy week of trading that saw it spike, retreat and spike again. But the messy price action is obscuring a quieter story: Wall Street keeps building around crypto regardless.】

item.title: 托克公司建立30亿美元流动性缓冲以应对价格波动
item.description: 托克集团获得了一项30亿美元的新信贷额度，以应对大宗商品市场的剧烈波动——这种波动可能使交易商面临巨额保证金追缴风险。【原文：Trafigura Group secured a new $3 billion credit facility to provide a liquidity buffer against sharp swings in commodity markets, which can leave traders exposed to huge margin calls.】

item.title: 伊拉克石油产量进一步削减，巴格达推动基尔库克油田重启
item.description: 由于伊朗战争的影响，伊拉克石油产量已降至每日120万桶。巴格达正积极推动重启北部基尔库克原油的出口，以弥补产量缺口。【原文：Iraq’s oil production has fallen to 1.2 million barrels a day because of the Iran war and Baghdad is pushing to restart export flows of its Kirkuk grade from the north of the country to help compensate.】

item.title: 尼日利亚暂停汽油进口许可证，达通集团获胜
item.description: 尼日利亚暂停发放汽油进口许可证，这对亿万富翁阿里科·丹格特而言是一场重大胜利。他掌控着非洲最大的炼油厂，并长期呼吁采取这一举措。【原文：Nigeria halted the issuance of import licenses for gasoline, a major win for billionaire Aliko Dangote, who controls Africa’s largest refinery and has long called for the move.】

item.title: 爱彼迎聘请优步资深高管富尔德纳担任全球运营主管
item.description: 爱彼迎公司任命优步科技公司资深高管格斯·富尔德纳为新任全球运营主管，此举标志着该公司业务多元化发展阶段的关键领导层任命。【原文：Airbnb Inc. has named longtime Uber Technologies Inc. executive Gus Fuldner as its new global head of operations, marking a key leadership hire at a time when the company’s business is diversifying.】

item.title: 英国天然气储备增加，因战时价格飙升吸引进口
item.description: 近日，英国向其天然气储存设施补充了部分天然气，因中东冲突引发的价格飙升吸引了进口。【原文：The UK added some natural gas into its storage sites in recent days, as a price surge triggered by the Middle East conflict attracted imports.】

item.title: 黑石、蓝猫收购美国私募股权公司Atlas少数股权
item.description: 黑石集团与蓝猫资本正联手收购美国私募股权公司阿特拉斯控股的少数股权，该公司管理的资产规模超过160亿美元。【原文：Blackstone Inc. and Blue Owl Capital Inc. are teaming up to acquire a minority stake in Atlas Holdings, a US private equity firm that manages more than $16 billion in assets.】

item.title: 亚马逊获法院禁令，阻止Perplexity的AI购物机器人
item.description: 法院本周裁定，Perplexity AI公司必须暂时停止使用其Comet网络浏览器代理程序，为亚马逊公司的在线市场购物者代为购买商品。【原文：Perplexity AI Inc. must for now stop using its Comet web browser agent to make purchases on behalf of shoppers from Amazon.com Inc.’s online marketplace, a court ruled this week.】

item.title: Meta将收购Moltbook——人工智能代理的病毒式社交网络
item.description: 全球最大的社交媒体公司正收购可能成为全球最奇特的社交网络。【原文：The world’s largest social media company is buying what may be the world’s strangest social network.】

item.title: 加拿大人的美国公路旅行降至四年最低水平
item.description: 2月份，仅有略超100万加拿大人驾车从美国返回，创下近四年来最低水平。【原文：Just over 1 million Canadians returned from the US by car in February, the lowest level in nearly four years.】

item.title: 索诺斯CEO汤姆·康拉德如何在应用程序灾难后重塑音频品牌
item.description: 汤姆·康拉德担任Sonos公司首席执行官的任期伊始，便遭遇了个人与公司双重危机。【原文：Tom Conrad’s tenure as CEO of Sonos Inc. kicked off with both personal and company crises.】

item.title: Russia Set for Oil-Revenue Surge in Coming Weeks on Iran War
item.description:
黑海原油运输中断抵消了上周油价飙升带来的收益，但这些收益终将到来

【原文：

Halt to Black Sea crude shipments offset benefits of soaring prices last week, but they’re coming

】

item.title: 七国集团要求国际能源署制定石油储备释放方案
item.description: 七国集团要求其主要能源机构制定紧急石油储备释放方案，以应对中东危机引发的市场动荡。【原文：Group of Seven nations asked their main energy agency to prepare scenarios for the release of emergency oil stockpiles as the Middle East crisis roils markets.】

item.title: 美国国债下跌，企业债券市场重现活力
item.description: 美国国债价格下跌，因油价和美股价格趋稳，且企业债券销售在暂停两天后重启。【原文：Treasuries fell as oil and US stock prices stabilized and corporate bond sales resumed after a two-day hiatus.】

item.title: 人工智能机器人初创企业Rhoda在新一轮融资中估值达17亿美元
item.description:
罗达利用广泛可用的网络视频，对工业机器人进行多种工况的训练

【原文：

Rhoda uses widely available internet video to train industrial robots for a variety of conditions

】

item.title: 美国成屋销售量上升，购房负担能力改善
item.description: 美国二手房销售量在2月份意外上升，且上月数据被上调，这得益于抵押贷款利率下降以及要价温和增长。【原文：Sales of previously owned US homes unexpectedly rose in February and the prior month was revised up, helped by a decline in mortgage rates and modest growth in asking prices.】

item.title: 谷歌将为五角大楼提供人工智能代理，用于非机密工作
item.description: 据一位高级国防官员透露，字母表公司旗下的谷歌正在五角大楼三百万名员工中推广人工智能代理，以实现例行工作的自动化。【原文：Alphabet Inc.’s Google is introducing artificial intelligence agents across the Pentagon’s three million-strong workforce to automate routine jobs, according to a senior defense official.】

item.title: 斯塔格威尔首席执行官认为竞争对手的动荡将带来新业务
item.description: 斯塔格威尔公司首席执行官马克·彭恩表示，竞争对手的动荡局面以及充满争议的中期选举周期将支撑公司今年的业绩表现。【原文：Stagwell Inc. Chief Executive Officer Mark Penn said disruption among competitors and a contentious midterm cycle will support the company’s performance this year.】

item.title: 次级贷款机构Goeasy股价暴跌39%，汽车贷款业务问题浮出水面
item.description: 加拿大次级贷款机构Goeasy Ltd.宣布暂停派息、撤回业绩展望，并表示将额外核销2.33亿加元（约合1.72亿美元）的消费贷款、利息及手续费。该公司股价应声暴跌，盘中跌幅一度高达39%。【原文：Canadian subprime lender Goeasy Ltd. suspended its dividend, withdrew its outlook and said it will write off an additional C$233 million ($172 million) in consumer loans, interest and fees. The shares plunged as much as 39%.】

item.title: 哥伦比亚初选搅乱选举预测 推动债券反弹
item.description: 哥伦比亚初选使五月总统大选局势变得扑朔迷离，重燃了市场对亲商新政府的期待，并推动主权债券价格反弹。【原文：Colombia’s primaries have thrown the May presidential election wide open, reviving hopes for a new market-friendly administration and triggering a rebound in sovereign bonds.】

item.title: US Natural Gas Extends Losses on Mild Weather, Global Price Drop
item.description: 美国天然气期货连续第二日下跌，因天气预报显示气温将回升，表明供暖和发电厂燃料需求将下降。【原文：US natural gas futures fell for a second day as weather forecasts shifted warmer, indicating lower demand for the heating and power-plant fuel.】

item.title: 索诺斯推出售价299美元的便携式Play音箱，结束新品荒
item.description: 索诺斯公司推出两款新音箱——这是该公司逾一年来首次发布消费级硬件产品——此前该公司耗费2025年修复其臭名昭著的应用程序事故造成的负面影响。【原文：Sonos Inc. introduced two new speakers — its first consumer hardware launch in more than a year — after spending 2025 repairing the fallout from its infamous app debacle.】

item.title: Creditors of Wall Street-Backed MFS Claim £1.3 Billion Shortfall
item.description: 根据最新法庭文件显示，英国倒闭抵押贷款公司Market Financial Solutions Ltd.的债权人面临13亿英镑（18亿美元）的资金缺口，并发现其与公司所有者存在密切关联的企业网络。【原文：Creditors of Market Financial Solutions Ltd., the failed UK mortgage company, are facing a shortfall of £1.3 billion ($1.8 billion) and have discovered a network of companies that were closely linked to its owner, according to fresh court filings.】

item.title: 博阿兹·温斯坦正通过对私有资产的折扣报价"买入悲观情绪"
item.description:
对冲基金经理提出收购蓝猫基金和喜达屋基金中失望的投资者——并表示这只是开始。【原文：

The hedge-fund manager offers to buy out frustrated investors in Blue Owl and Starwood funds — and says he’s just getting started

】

item.title: 苹果599美元的MacBook Neo颠覆笔记本行业格局：评测
item.description: The $599 MacBook Neo, available in stores this Wednesday, proves that it’s possible to make a laptop that stays true to Apple Inc.’s reputation for craftsmanship, performance and reliability — even at roughly half the price of the popular MacBook Air. By reaching that price point, the company is opening up macOS to a completely new market of first-time buyers who previously couldn’t afford to splurge, or simply preferred not to.

item.title: 以色列初创企业Jazz为人工智能数据防丢失技术筹集6100万美元
item.description: 以色列初创公司Jazz获得6100万美元融资，用于打造基于人工智能的数据防丢失平台。【原文：Israel’s Jazz raised $61 million in funding to create a platform that uses artificial intelligence to tackle data loss prevention.】

item.title: 英伟达将投资Thinking Machines实验室并提供人工智能芯片
item.description: 英伟达公司正对人工智能公司Thinking Machines Lab进行新一轮投资，该公司由前OpenAI高管米拉·穆拉蒂创立。英伟达将为该初创企业提供芯片，助力其人工智能模型的训练与运行。【原文：Nvidia Corp. is making a new investment in Thinking Machines Lab, an artificial intelligence company founded by former OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and will supply chips to help train and run the startup’s AI models.】

item.title: 巴西GPA公司与债权人达成庭外债务重组协议
item.description: 巴西分销公司宣布与主要债权人达成协议，将提交庭外重组方案，这家巴西零售商正着手重组其债务。【原文：Companhia Brasileira de Distribuição announced an agreement with its main creditors to file an out-of-court restructuring plan as the Brazilian retailer reworks its debt.】
